bio: Quality Engineering Specialist with a focus on aerospace and medical device manufacturing standards. I deliver robust quality systems and process improvements that reduce non-conformances and optimize production efficiency.
name: ABDULLAH CHOUDARY
title: Quality Engineering Specialist

community.description: Led campaign strategy and volunteer coordination, placing 4th of 14 candidates in a first-time campaign.

education.description: Mechanical Engineering with a focus on quality systems and manufacturing processes.

highlights: Reduced recurring non-conformances by leading 8D root cause analysis across 10+ suppliers.
Authored PFMEAs and Control Plans, ensuring AS9100D compliance for new product introduction.
Drove corrective action effectiveness, reducing scrap and rework across SMT and PCBA assembly.
experience.description: Manages supplier quality performance and internal audit compliance for PCB/PCBA manufacturing operations.

highlights: Produced validation reports (IQ, OQ, PQ) for production machinery, ensuring operational readiness.
Supported teams assigned to CARs, contributing to timely resolution of quality issues.
Amended work instructions for various departments, improving process clarity and compliance.
experience.description: Supported quality control across incoming, process, and outgoing stages, including supplier quality and RMA dispositions.

sloganHeroSection: Implementing AS9100D and ISO 13485 quality systems to ensure product integrity.
